headlines.title: NASA’s Psyche Mission Images Mars’ Huygens Crater
headlines.summary: Description Captured by the multispectral imager instrument on NASA’s Psyche mission, this is an enhanced-color view of the large double-ring crater Huygens (upper right; about 290 miles, or 470 kilometers, in diameter)
